reasoning: James has shown improvement in using articles and vocabulary related to shopping. Transitioning to ordering food can build on this progress by introducing him to vocabulary and sentence structures used in restaurants, a practical application of skills he finds engaging. This also connects with his interest in informal conversation topics and can enhance his confidence in real-world scenarios.
opening_approach: Begin by discussing James' favorite dishes and asking about his restaurant experiences. Use this to introduce key phrases and vocabulary for ordering food.
watch_for: use of 'Ich hätte gerne' in new contexts
